title: Thai Stuffed Enab Wraps
description: Delicious Thai-inspired stuffed enab wraps with crispy tofu, eastern-style spices, and a hint of warak.

ingredients.name: Eastern spices
ingredients.notes: Mix of Thai red chili, cumin, and coriander

instructions: 2. Cut the enab in half lengthwise and scoop out the insides.
3. In a pan, heat some oil over medium heat. Add the crispy tofu and cook until golden brown.
4. In a bowl, mix the eastern spices, ginger, lime juice, and soy sauce.
5. Stuff each enab half with the tofu mixture, followed by some chopped warak.
6. Place the stuffed enab on a baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes.
